# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent api gateway security.
# Category: api_gateway_security

- 200
              request_method:
                - GET
              content_type:
                - "application/json; charset=utf-8"
              cache_ttl: 300
              strategy: memory
              memory:
                dictionary_name: kong_db_cache

      - name: products-admin
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products
        methods:
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        plugins:
          - name: jwt
            config:
              header_names:
                - Authorization
              claims_to_verify:
                - exp
              key_claim_name: iss
              secret_is_base64: false
              run_on_preflight: true
              maximum_expiration: 3600
          - name: acl
            config:
              allow:
                - admin
                - product-manager
              hide_groups_header: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 30
              hour: 500
              policy: redis
              redis_host: redis
              redis_port: 6379
              redis_database: 0
              redis_timeout: 2000
              fault_tolerant: true

      - name: products-search
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products/search
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 60
              hour: 1500
              policy: redis
              redis_host: redis
              redis_port: 6379
              redis_database: 0
              redis_timeout: 2000
              fault_tolerant: true
          - name: proxy-cache
            config:
              response_code:
                - 200
              request_method:
                - GET
              content_type:
                - "application/json; charset=utf-8"
              cache_ttl: 60
              strategy: memory
              memory:
                dictionary_name: kong_db_cache

    plugins:
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 10
          size_unit: megabytes
          require_content_length: false

# Global plugins applied to all services and routes
plugins:
  # Correlation ID for distributed tracing
  - name: correlation-id
    config:
      header_name: X-Request-ID
      generator: uuid#counter
      echo_downstream: true

  # Global bot detection
  - name: bot-detection
    config:
      allow: []
      deny:
        - "Scrapy"
        - "SemrushBot"
        - "AhrefsBot"
        - "MJ12bot"
        - "DotBot"

  # Response transformer - security headers
  - name: response-transformer
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff"
          - "X-Frame-Options:DENY"
          - "X-XSS-Protection:1; mode=block"
          - "Strict-Transport-Security:max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload"
          - "Content-Security-Policy:default-src 'self'"
          - "Referrer-Policy:strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
          - "Permissions-Policy:geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=()"
          - "Cache-Control:no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate"
          - "Pragma:no-cache"
      remove:
        headers:
          - "Server"
          - "X-Powered-By"
          - "X-Kong-Upstream-Latency"
          - "X-Kong-Proxy-Latency"
          - "Via"

  # TCP/HTTP log for centralized logging
  - name: tcp-log
    config:
      host: logstash
      port: 5044
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      tls: false

  # Prometheus metrics
  - name: prometheus
    config:
      per_consumer: true
      status_code_metrics: true
      latency_metrics: true
      bandwidth_metrics: true
      upstream_health_metrics: true

  # CORS configuration
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-Requested-With
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-RateLimit-Limit-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  # Global request termination for maintenance mode (disabled by default)
  # Uncomment and set enabled: true during maintenance windows
  # - name: request-termination
  #   enabled: false
  #   config:
  #     status_code: 503
  #     message: "Service temporarily unavailable for maintenance"
  #     content_type: "application/json"
  #     body: '{"error":"service_unavailable","message":"We are currently performing scheduled maintenance. Please try again later."}'

# Consumer definitions for API key and JWT authentication
consumers:
  - username: internal-service-a
    custom_id: "svc-internal-a"
    tags:
      - internal
      - service
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: "internal-service-a-issuer"
        algorithm: "RS256"
    acls:
      - group: authenticated-users

  - username: internal-service-b
    custom_id: "svc-internal-b"
    tags:
      - internal
      - service
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: "internal-service-b-issuer"
        algorithm: "RS256"
    acls:
      - group: authenticated-users

  - username: admin-service
    custom_id: "svc-admin"
    tags:
      - internal
      - admin
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: "admin-service-issuer"
        algorithm: "RS256"
    acls:
      - group: admin
      - group: authenticated-users
      - group: product-manager

  - username: mobile-app
    custom_id: "client-mobile"
    tags:
      - external
      - mobile
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: "mobile-app-issuer"
        algorithm: "RS256"
    acls:
      - group: authenticated-users

  - username: web-app
    custom_id: "client-web"
    tags:
      - external
      - web
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: "web-app-issuer"
        algorithm: "RS256"
    acls:
      - group: authenticated-users

# Certificate definitions for mTLS with upstream services
certificates:
  - cert: "{vault://env/KONG_SSL_CERT}"
    key: "{vault://env/KONG_SSL_CERT_KEY}"
    tags:
      - production
    snis:
      - name: "api.example.com"
      - name: "*.api.example.com"
